title: Arlong Park Crumbles
description: On pages 2–5, arlong park crumbles focuses on Luffy, Nami, Arlong, Nojiko as luffy destroys Arlong Park and declares Nami his crewmate, ending Arlong’s rule over Cocoyashi.
scene: On pages 2–5, arlong park crumbles focuses on Luffy, Nami, Arlong, Nojiko as luffy destroys Arlong Park and declares Nami his crewmate, ending Arlong’s rule over Cocoyashi.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The hell's going on? So freakin' noisy...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...just what the heck happened in there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...After that best- auction, I can't possibly imagine that...

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
